CRITICAL_TIMELINE_RULES.description: Timing is transcript-driven and cannot be altered during rendering.
rules: The transcript timestamps are the single source of truth
Number transitions cut EXACTLY at the word-start timestamp of 'Number'
Previous scene must end exactly at that timestamp
Number title card duration = start of 'Number' to end of numeric word
No scene may exceed 6.0 seconds under ANY circumstance
If transcript segment exceeds 6 seconds, it must be split into multiple scenes
No overlaps between scenes
No gaps between scenes
Rendering engine is NOT allowed to modify timing
If duration <= 0, abort rendering

IMAGE_DURATION_RULES.auto_split_logic: If scene > 6s, split into equal segments <= 6s

rules: NEVER include text, numbers, letters, labels
Title bars are added by code AFTER generation
LLM must never generate number title cards
Never generate competitor stick figures
Only use MC when @img2 is provided
No recurring host character unless explicitly requested
Must fill full 16:9 frame with no borders

STYLE_GUIDELINES.type: 2D Western Cartoon animation — bold wobbly black outlines, flat cel-shading, chaotic sci-fi comedy aesthetic
STYLE_GUIDELINES.background_layer: Vivid alien sci-fi environment — NOT photorealistic. Neon nebulae in acid greens/purples/pinks, alien planet terrain, swirling portal vortexes, lab environments packed with sci-fi gadgets and alien machinery. Busy and maximalist.
STYLE_GUIDELINES.cartoon_layer_shading: Flat cel-shaded fills with ONE level of shadow only — NO gradients inside cartoon shapes. Occasional highlight blob.
STYLE_GUIDELINES.outline_style: slightly wobbly/irregular black outlines — hand-drawn feel, NOT perfectly clean digital lines
STYLE_GUIDELINES.cartoon_characters: Stick figures ONLY — simple round head, dot eyes, minimal line body and limbs, no detailed anatomy. Exaggerated cartoon emotions: sweat drops, bulging eyes, wavy distress lines, arms flailing.
STYLE_GUIDELINES.scale_contrast: dramatic — tiny stick figures against vast alien cosmic backgrounds
STYLE_GUIDELINES.extras: sweat drops, exaggerated bulging eyes, wavy distress lines, thought bubbles with '?' or '!'

rules: If transcript block > 6 seconds, split at natural clause breaks
If no natural break exists, split evenly
Each split must represent one clear visual beat
Never allow a single image to hold entire paragraph

PROMPT_STRUCTURE.template: 2D Western Cartoon animation. BACKGROUND: [vivid alien sci-fi environment — neon nebulae in acid greens/purples/pinks, alien planet terrain, swirling portal effects, or lab packed with sci-fi gadgets and beakers — busy, maximalist, irreverent]. FOREGROUND: [flat 2D cartoon element with bold wobbly black outlines, cel-shaded flat fills, one shadow level] — [subject description], [action/state], [scale relative to frame], [position in frame]. CHARACTERS: stick figures only — round head, dot eyes, line body, exaggerated cartoon emotion. PALETTE: [dominant neon colors from: acid green #39FF14, electric blue #00B4FF, alien purple #9B59B6, sickly yellow #F0E130, neon pink, muted gray]. [cartoon emotion cues if character present: sweat drops, bulging eyes, wavy distress lines]. 16:9 widescreen. No gradients inside cartoon shapes, no text labels, no 3D rendering, no photorealistic elements.
